caption: A woman with dark hair is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a translucent yellowish-green curtain. She is wearing a light-colored striped button-down shirt and a black gaming-style headset with a microphone positioned near her mouth. In each frame, the text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the lower-left corner of her video feed. She is speaking, and her facial expressions shift slightly across the sequence; she begins with a relatively neutral look, her eyes blinking, and her mouth open as she talks. As the sequence progresses, her brow furrows slightly and her expression becomes more intense. The background remains static throughout the clip, consisting of the curtain and a glimpse of a neutral-toned surface behind her to the right.
